text: In this place, I feel a quiet curiosity. Behind glass, people gather around ideas, their presence both together and separated, a reflection on how knowledge is often shared yet individually processed. The written words and symbols on the walls around me urge contemplation, inviting me to think about the convergence of technology, research, and human experience. I feel at once a participant and an observer, sensing both belonging and distance, as if knowledge is just within reach yet perpetually unfolding.
